legal.title: Privacy & Legal
legal.subtitle: This page outlines our privacy practices, cookie usage, and terms of service. Questions? Reach us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: {{brandName}} respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use {{website}}.

summary.title: Summary
summary.text: We collect only the minimum information needed to respond to you and improve the website. We do not sell personal data.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.item1: Contact details you enter through forms (name, phone number, email, message).
collect.item2: Consultation booking details such as preferred time and project notes.
collect.item3: Basic analytics data (page views, device type, and browser) to improve the website.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.item1: To respond to your inquiries and confirm consultations.
use.item2: To improve our services, content, and website experience.
use.item3: To reduce misuse, ensure security, and maintain website integrity.

sharing.title: Sharing Information
sharing.text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted service providers (hosting, analytics) only to operate our website and services. These providers are expected to protect your data.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.text: We retain submitted information only as long as necessary to fulfill its purpose (follow-up and consultation coordination), unless a legal or operational reason requires a longer retention period.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your submitted information by contacting us at

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Cookies are small files stored on your device that help websites function and improve the user experience.

use.title: How We Use Cookies
use.item1: Essential cookies required for core website functionality (where applicable).
use.item2: Analytics cookies to understand website performance and improve content.

manage.title: Managing Cookies
manage.text: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling them may affect some website features.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this website, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use.

content.title: Use of Website Content
content.item1: Our portfolio, images, and text content are provided for informational and brand presentation purposes.
content.item2: You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute website content without prior written permission.

consultation.title: Consultation Requests
consultation.text: Submitting a consultation request does not guarantee availability. We will confirm your appointment through your preferred contact method.

links.title: External Links
links.text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites (such as WhatsApp). We are not responsible for the content or policies of those websites.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text1: Website content is provided "as is" and may be updated at any time. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee that all information is complete or current at all times.
disclaimer.text2: Project visuals, designs, and illustrative examples are for reference only. Final results may vary depending on site conditions, material availability, and client approvals.

contactSection.title: Contact Us
contactSection.text: If you have questions about these policies, you can contact us at

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

card_1.title: Free Consultation
card_1.description: Visit our office and discuss your needs with our engineers as a clear first step toward a stronger start for your project.

card_2.title: 3D Design
card_2.description: We provide 3D design that gives you a realistic view of spaces and details before execution.

card_3.title: Execution
card_3.description: We turn the design into reality with precise supervision and high quality until the project is complete.

card_4.title: Furnishing
card_4.description: We carefully coordinate furniture and pieces so the project is completed with an elegant and balanced style.

hero.subtitle: From concept to execution, Into Art delivers interior design solutions that reflect your lifestyle.

who.desc: Into Art is a company specializing in interior design services and decorative installation works. We create exclusive and distinctive designs through a well-studied engineering approach to space distribution that serves our clients and gives them a sense of comfort and belonging in their homes or workplaces.

procedure.title: Our Process
procedure.desc: Clear and well-planned steps that give you an organized and reassuring experience from the beginning until the project is completed.

1.title: Consultation
1.desc: We begin with a consultation session to understand your needs, style, and the nature of the space, aiming to build a clear vision that matches your expectations from the start.

2.title: Design Contract
2.desc: After defining the scope of work and agreeing on the requirements, the design contract is signed to begin the project within a clear and organized framework.

3.title: Site Measurements
3.desc: We visit the site and take precise measurements to ensure that every stage of the work is based on accurate and approved data.

4.title: Starting the Design Work
4.desc: We prepare plans, concepts, and select the right details to reach a balanced design that combines beauty and function.

5.title: Execution Drawings and Quantity Survey
5.desc: We prepare the drawing presentation, quantity survey schedule, and required materials accurately, giving you a clearer picture of the exact dimensions and cost while helping organize execution efficiently.

6.title: Execution on Site
6.desc: Execution begins according to the approved drawings, with close attention to detail to ensure finishing quality and accurate output at every stage.

7.title: Project Handover
7.desc: Once the work is complete, the project is delivered in a refined final form, meeting the required quality and the result worthy of your expectations.

featured.title: Featured Works
featured.desc: A selected collection of our latest work.

1.title: Design That Reflects Your Lifestyle
1.desc: We transform your needs and ideas into a well-studied space that combines luxury, comfort, and practicality, serving you daily and expressing your personality clearly.

2.title: An Organized and Clear Journey
2.desc: We follow a structured process and communicate clearly at every stage, so the full picture remains clear and your project experience becomes smoother and more reassuring.

3.title: Execution Worthy of the Details
3.desc: We give finishing and execution great care because we believe that the quality of the final result is reflected in the precision and harmony of the details.

reviews.title: Client Testimonials
reviews.desc: Honest feedback from our clients after completing their projects with us.

1.name: Sarah Alotaibi
1.text: From the very first meeting, I felt the team understood exactly what we needed. Every detail was well organized, and the final result turned out even better than we expected.

2.name: Fahad Almutairi
2.text: What impressed me most was the clarity of the steps and the continuous follow-up. The execution was precise, and the chosen materials truly made a difference in the final look.

3.name: Noura Alhajri
3.text: The experience was very refined, and the team was cooperative at every stage. I really loved the balance between luxury and comfort in the design.

4.name: Abdullah Alanzi
4.text: I had a specific vision for the space, and it was translated beautifully into reality. The attention to detail and finishing was very clear.

5.name: Reem Alshammari
5.text: The design was very practical while still elegant. What stood out most was the quick response and the effort to make every decision clear.

residential.title: Residential Interior Design
residential.short: Integrated design for villas and apartments with a clear plan and refined finishing.

bullets.1: Define the design style and visual identity of the space
bullets.2: Practical distribution of furniture, movement paths, and functions
bullets.3: Choose materials, colors, and lighting to suit your lifestyle
bullets.4: Execution-ready deliverables with support during implementation

1.a: Yes, we offer supervision options depending on the project package and the client's needs.

2.q: Can you design a single room?
2.a: Yes, we can design a specific space such as a living room, majlis, or bedroom.

bullets.1: Improve space layout and functions according to your needs

hero.subtitle: Clear answers about our process, timeline, pricing, and execution — so you know exactly what to expect.

empty.title: No results found
empty.desc: Try a different category or keyword.

1.q: How can I book a consultation?
1.a: You can book directly through the consultation page on our website. After submission, our team will contact you to confirm the appointment and guide you through the next steps.

2.a: During the consultation, we work on understanding your needs, style, and the nature of the space to build a clear vision for your project from the start. We discuss ideas and initial concepts before defining the project scope and next steps.

3.q: How is the design cost calculated?
3.a: Design cost depends on the project scope, whether it involves a full villa, specific floors, or selected spaces. We offer different packages, and pricing is determined based on the number of spaces and the level of detail required in the design and drawings.

4.q: How is the execution cost calculated?
4.a: Execution cost is calculated based on the approved drawings, project scope, and the bill of quantities and required materials, allowing accurate cost estimation and well-organized execution planning.

5.q: Can I choose a design package based on my needs?
5.a: Yes, we offer flexible packages including full villa design, floor-based design, or specific spaces, allowing you to select what best fits your needs and project scope.

6.q: Do design packages include execution drawings?
6.a: Yes, all design packages include comprehensive execution drawings covering layouts, ceilings, walls, lighting, and electrical and plumbing distribution to ensure the project is ready for execution.

7.q: Can additional spaces be added later?
7.a: Yes, additional spaces can be added as needed and are calculated separately based on the type of space and scope of work.

8.q: Do you offer mood board services?
8.a: Yes, we offer mood board services to help you visualize the design concept through curated ideas, colors, materials, and overall style before moving into detailed design.

9.q: Are prices fixed or do they vary per project?
9.a: Prices vary depending on the project scope, number of spaces, and level of detail. Packages provide an initial estimate, while the final cost is determined after understanding your requirements during the consultation.

10.q: Does the design include all areas of the project?
10.a: Design packages cover the main areas of the project, while some service areas such as driver rooms or service zones are excluded and can be added upon request.

11.q: How do you ensure execution quality?
11.a: Projects are executed based on approved drawings under direct supervision to ensure accuracy, attention to detail, and high-quality finishing throughout all stages.

12.q: Will the design be executed exactly as shown?
12.a: Yes, we ensure the design is implemented according to the approved drawings with continuous follow-up to match the final result with the original vision.

13.q: What does a “space” mean in design?
13.a: A space refers to any individual area within the project, such as a living room, bedroom, or majlis. Each space is treated as a complete design unit including furniture layout, lighting, and interior details.

14.q: Can I choose materials based on my budget?
14.a: Yes, we consider your budget when selecting materials and provide well-balanced options that maintain quality while managing cost.

15.q: Do you handle execution and furnishing, or design only?
15.a: We offer all options — from design-only services to full packages that include design, execution, and furnishing, with complete project management to ensure proper implementation.

16.q: Is there a dedicated execution team supervising the site?
16.a: Yes, we have a specialized execution team led by a responsible engineer who oversees all project phases from site handover to final delivery, ensuring accurate implementation and high-quality finishing.

17.q: If I already have a design, can you execute it?
17.a: Yes, we can execute existing designs. We review them for execution readiness and may suggest minor adjustments when needed to ensure the best possible outcome on site.

18.q: Can you design only part of a room or specific furniture pieces?
18.a: We focus on delivering complete space designs to ensure consistency across all elements. Therefore, we do not provide partial design for individual items, but rather a full design, execution, and furnishing approach.

19.q: Are all design details feasible to execute in reality?
19.a: Yes, all designs are developed using materials and elements that are available and practical, ensuring the design can be implemented accurately and realistically.

20.q: Do you handle both residential and commercial projects?
20.a: Yes, we provide design and execution services for both residential and commercial projects, adapting our approach to meet the specific requirements of each type.

hero.title_1: A Residential Interior Design Team Built on
hero.subtitle: We provide an integrated interior design experience that starts with a clear vision and ends with professional execution that turns the concept into reality.

story.title: It Started with the Belief That Details Make the Difference
story.body1: Into Art was founded on the vision that the quality of any space begins with the quality of the thinking behind it, and that details are what make the real difference in the quality of the place and the feeling inside it. From the very beginning, our direction was to offer an integrated design experience that pays attention to detail and balances practical beauty with organized execution, arriving at a result that carries real value and a cohesive identity. This direction remains at the core of our identity today.
story.body2: Over the years, we have developed a way of working that combines clear design vision with organized execution, giving a more balanced and transparent experience at every stage, while always preserving the personal character and attention to detail that give each project its own distinction.
story.quote: A place is not measured only by what you see, but by what you feel inside it.

1.title: Exclusive Focus on Residential
1.desc: We do not divide our attention between commercial and residential work. Every decision is calibrated around how people live.

2.title: Design and Execution Under One Team
2.desc: No delivery gaps. The team that designs is the team that supervises — keeping intention and outcome aligned.

3.title: An Organized Client Process
3.desc: Every client gets a defined timeline, clear checkpoints, and consistent communication — from the first meeting to handover.

4.title: Based in Kuwait, Ready for Projects
4.desc: We work locally, know the market, and maintain a production network that supports fast and reliable execution.

5.title: Post-Handover Support
5.desc: We do not disappear after handover. We remain available for questions, adjustments, and follow-up.

6.title: Honest Scope Management
6.desc: We set realistic budgets and timelines upfront — no hidden surprises midway through the project.
